question: Based on the chart, what can we conclude about the average energy usage for the entire week (Monday to Sunday)?

options.A: The average for the week is about 21 kWh, using only Monday to Wednesday.
options.B: The weekly average is exactly 20 kWh because the three visible bars are close in height.
options.C: The average for the week is about 9 kWh, computed from all seven days including those with zero usage.
options.D: We cannot reliably determine the weekly average because usage for several days is not shown.

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
